rows.description: Bunyear's Rent of Dry Piece, L. White to Mich. 1834
rows.notes: Amount values are consensus. The description was selected based on gemini-flash ('Bunyear's' and 'Mich.') over gpt-5-mini ('Bungean's' and 'Michl'). Visual verification confirms 'Bunyear's' and 'Mich.' as more accurate readings. gpt-5-mini's note on the uncertainty of the name was helpful.
rows.english_description: Payment relating to Bunyear's rent for the property called the Dry Piece, concerning L. White up to Michaelmas 1834.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment relating to Bunyear's rent for the Dry Piece (concerning L. White to Michaelmas 1834), amounting to £23 0s 0d.

rows.description: Expenses of a Deputation to Wootten on the proposed exchange, which was rejected
rows.notes: Amount values are consensus. The description was selected based on gemini-flash ('Wootten') over gpt-5-mini ('London'). Visual verification clearly shows 'Wootten' as the place name.
rows.english_description: Expenses incurred by a deputation to Wootten regarding a proposed property exchange which was rejected.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Expenses incurred by a deputation to Wootten regarding a proposed property exchange which was rejected, amounting to £5 16s 6d.

rows.description: To Mr Burrows for a plan of the premises & Estate at Bampton
rows.notes: Amount values are consensus. The description was selected based on gemini-flash ('Bampton') over gpt-5-mini ('Brampton'). Visual verification confirms 'Bampton' from the letter-forms. gpt-5-mini's note about the 'M/MP cluster' was a good observation of the ambiguity.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Burrows for producing a plan of the premises and estate at Bampton.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Burrows for producing a plan of the premises and estate at Bampton, amounting to £1 1s 0d.

rows.description: To Shrubb. one years Int. on 150£ to Mich. 1834
rows.notes: Amount values are consensus. The description was selected based on gemini-flash, as visual verification clearly shows 'Shrubb.' and '150£' rather than 'Struth' and 'Bkt' (gpt-5-mini). gpt-5-mini's note regarding ambiguity was insightful, but gemini-flash's reading aligns better with the source.
rows.english_description: Payment of one year's interest on £150 to Shrubb, to Michaelmas 1834.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of one year's interest on £150 to Shrubb, to Michaelmas 1834, amounting to £6 0s 0d.

rows.description: To G. Boscom for services on acct of the Fire at Young's Farm
rows.notes: Amount values are consensus. The description was selected based on gemini-flash ('Boscom') over gpt-5-mini ('Bosform'). Visual verification leans towards 'Boscom', although the script for the 'c' is open and could be misread. Both extractors noted the stylized nature of the name.
rows.english_description: Payment to G. Boscom for services related to the fire at Young's Farm.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to G. Boscom for services related to the fire at Young's Farm, amounting to £1 13s 0d.

rows.notes: Amount values are consensus. The description was selected based on gemini-flash ('Davis'' and 'Sew.') over gpt-5-mini ('Davis's' and 'Ew.'). Visual verification confirms the apostrophe placement for 'Davis'' and the 'S' in 'Sew.'.
rows.english_description: Mr Davis's agency bill for work at Little Sewell up to Christmas 1834.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Mr Davis's agency bill for work at Little Sewell to Christmas 1834, amounting to £16 16s 0d.

rows.description: Steward's Bill, Mr Walsh, to Xmas 1834

rows.description: To Ed. Grave for Pension in 1833 & 1834
rows.notes: Both description and amount values for shillings differed. Selected gemini-flash's 'Ed. Grave for Pension' and '4 shillings' over gpt-5-mini's 'E. Grove for Venison' and '7 shillings' based on clear visual verification of the name, purpose, and the number '4' in the shillings column.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Edward Grave for pension covering 1833 and 1834, amounting to £15 4s 8d.

rows.description: To Mr Young, expenses on acct of the Fire
rows.notes: Selected gpt-5-mini's amount values (1 pound, 13 shillings, 0 pence). gpt-5-mini's note accurately described the ambiguity of the shillings digit ('slightly cramped and could be read as 3 or 13') and provided reasoning for choosing '13'. Visual verification confirmed the value to be '13', not '9' as read by gemini-flash.
rows.english_description: Reimbursement to Mr Young for expenses incurred in connection with the fire.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Reimbursement to Mr Young for expenses incurred in connection with the fire, amounting to £1 13s 0d.

rows.notes: Amount values are consensus. The description was manually constructed based on visual verification, as both extractors had partial errors. The correct reading is 'Fine Battells - Xmas & Lady Day 1835', combining parts from both and correcting ('Fine' not 'Wine', 'Battells' not 'Battele', 'Xmas & Lady Day' not 'Wines & Day').
rows.english_description: Payment of fine battels for the half-year periods of Christmas and Lady Day 1835.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of fine battels for the half-year periods of Christmas and Lady Day 1835, amounting to £24 2s 0d.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Supplementary payment of official dues to Mr Richards, Subrector, to Michaelmas 1835, amounting to £2 14s 2d.

rows.notes: Amount values are consensus. The description was selected based on gemini-flash ('Dº') over gpt-5-mini ('Do:'). Visual verification confirms the superscript 'o' symbol in the ledger for 'Dº'.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Augmentation of salary to Mr Richards, amounting to £100 0s 0d.

rows.description: To Dº Bill for Sundry expenses

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of a sundry-expenses bill to Mr Richards, amounting to £1 9s 10d.
